text: The improvements are well maintained and feature limited physical depreciation due to normal wear and tear. Some components, but not every major building component, may be updated or recently rehabilitated. The structure has been well maintained. During the time of inspection the basement and foundation were observed and no immediate necessary repairs were identified. The condition of the subject's foundation is consistent with that of houses of a similar age and location, however, the appraiser lacks the qualifications to be considered an expert in foundation repair. The subject has received recent renovations to convert space previously used for office space into residential units. The renovations are above average for the neighborhood and attract tenants willing to pay for renovated units. The subject is a three unit multi-family residence with five above grade bedroom, three above grade bathrooms, living room fireplace in Unit #1, partial unfinished basement, common laundry area, and ample parking for tenants.
